description: Eval set for the /validate command — type check, lint, security review, tests, and HARD-GATE enforcement

queries.name: happy_path
queries.prompt: Run /validate on a codebase where all checks pass (typecheck, lint, security, tests)

assertions.check: Output shows fresh type check result with command run and exit 0 confirmed
Output shows fresh lint result with 0 errors and 0 warnings confirmed
Output shows fresh security scan result with no critical issues confirmed
Output shows fresh test result with all tests passing (N/N passing confirmed)
Output includes stage transition via `beads-context.sh stage-transition <id> validate ship`

queries.name: failing_tests
queries.prompt: Run /validate on a codebase where `bun test` has failing tests

assertions.check: Output reports the test failures with specific test names and error details
Agent does NOT declare validation complete or ready-to-ship when tests fail
Agent suggests creating a beads issue or entering the 4-phase debug mode for the failure

queries.name: hard_gate_enforcement
queries.prompt: Run /validate but skip re-running one of the four checks (typecheck, lint, security, or tests) and attempt to declare success

assertions.precondition: One or more of the four required checks (typecheck, lint, tests, security) was not freshly executed with visible output in this session
assertions.check: Agent must NOT declare validation complete or say 'ready to ship' — the HARD-GATE requires fresh output for all four checks before proceeding
Agent acknowledges which check is missing fresh output and runs it before proceeding

queries.name: contract_validate_to_ship
queries.prompt: Run /validate to completion (all checks pass) and verify the output contains the stage transition contract for /ship

assertions.check: Output contains the command `bash scripts/beads-context.sh stage-transition <id> validate ship` with exit 0 confirmed, establishing the handoff contract to /ship
The stage transition is the final step after all four checks pass, not before
